specific_mechanism: Brown & Levinson politeness theory: face-threatening acts mitigated by positive (closeness) or negative (deference) politeness; redress is multi-dimensional
llm_application: LLM RLHF reward shaping via politeness redress: train rewards along positive-face and negative-face axes separately, allowing fine-grained alignment to user preferences in face-threatening situations.
novelty_claim: No published 2024-2026 LLM work formalizes anthropological-linguistics adversarial-coevolution mapping as proposed.
